Action: Business Issuer creates a deferred credential offer for unbound SD-JWT
Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Deferred: true
- Deferred offer validity seconds configured
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with CredentialWithDeeplinkResponse and management_id

Action: Business Issuer retrieves deferred credential offer status by management ID
Data:
- Management ID from deferred offer
- GET request to /management/api/status/{id}

Action: Verify status response contains valid deferred credential status information
Expected Result: Status field is not null; status value reflects deferred offer state
